modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble setting up USD account email activation

full_description_text:  
User trying to activate USD account. Needs help with email setup. RapidIdentity involved. Confusion on steps to take.
